summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2-5 features for Jolly's Kafe restaurant app. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new pages and components are working correctly. Features tested: Customer registration/login, Order creation/tracking, Admin order management, Site settings management.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/customer/register creates customer with auto-verified=true, returns password and token
Backend: POST /api/customer/register rejects duplicate email
Backend: POST /api/customer/login with email+password works and returns token
Backend: POST /api/customer/login rejects invalid password
Backend: GET /api/customer/me returns customer profile with token
Backend: GET /api/customer/me fails without token (401)
Backend: GET /api/site-status/{location_id} returns is_open status based on schedule
Backend: All 5 locations have site status endpoints working
Backend: POST /api/orders creates order when customer is verified and site is open
Backend: Order number starts with JK- prefix
Backend: POST /api/orders fails without authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/orders/track/{order_number} returns order details and status
Backend: GET /api/orders/track returns 404 for non-existent order
Backend: Admin login works with admin@jollys.com / Admin123!
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders lists orders (admin auth required)
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders fails without auth (401)
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/orders/{order_id}/status updates order through flow: pending->confirmed->preparing->ready->collected
Backend: Admin can cancel orders
Backend: GET /api/admin/site-settings returns all 5 location settings
Backend: PUT /api/admin/site-settings/{location_id} updates opening hours
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/site-settings/{location_id}/toggle toggles ordering with manual_override=true
Frontend: /customer-auth page renders with Register/Login tabs
Frontend: Customer registration form has name, email, phone fields with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Customer login form has email, password fields
Frontend: Registration creates account and shows generated password
Frontend: After registration, user is redirected to menu catalog
Frontend: /order-status page has order number input and track button
Frontend: Order tracking shows 'Order not found' error for invalid order numbers
Frontend: /menu-catalog shows site status banner (Online Ordering Open)
Frontend: /menu-catalog shows Track Order and Login to Order buttons
Frontend: /admin-login page renders with email/password form
Frontend: Admin login redirects to admin-menu after successful login
Frontend: /admin-orders page shows order list with status badges (Pending, Confirmed, Collected, Cancelled)
Frontend: /admin-orders has location and status filter dropdowns
Frontend: /admin-orders shows customer info, items, and totals for each order
Frontend: /admin-site-settings page shows all 5 locations with toggle switches
Frontend: /admin-site-settings shows opening hours for each day
Frontend: /admin-site-settings has Edit Hours button for each location
Frontend: /admin-site-settings shows Auto/Manual override toggle
Frontend: /shopping-cart shows empty cart message with Browse Menu button
Frontend: /shopping-cart has collection-only notice

test_credentials.test_customers: Multiple test customers created during testing with auto-generated passwords

seed_data_creation: Multiple test customers and orders created during backend testing. Orders visible in admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2-5 features fully implemented and tested: (1) Customer auth with auto-verification (no Resend key), password generation, JWT tokens. (2) Order creation with JK- prefix, collection-only, verified customers only. (3) Order tracking by order number. (4) Admin order management with status flow (pending->confirmed->preparing->ready->collected). (5) Site settings with opening hours, ordering toggle, manual override. All 5 locations seeded with default hours. Email/SMS notifications are MOCKED (no Resend/Twilio API keys configured).

mocked_integrations.Resend Email: Notifications coded but skip when RESEND_API_KEY not configured. Customers auto-verified on registration.
mocked_integrations.Twilio SMS: Notifications coded but skip when TWILIO_* env vars not configured.
